name: elgato-key-light
title: Elgato Key Light
description: Control your Elgato Key Lights with ease
author: thomas

commands.name: configure-target-lights
commands.title: Configure Target Lights
commands.subtitle: Elgato Key Light
commands.description: Choose whether commands control all lights or only selected discovered lights

commands.name: discoverLights
commands.title: Discover Lights
commands.subtitle: Elgato Key Light
commands.description: Force a fresh discovery of Key Lights on your network

commands.name: toggle
commands.title: Toggle Lights
commands.subtitle: Elgato Key Light
commands.description: Toggles the targeted Key Lights on or off

commands.name: increaseBrightness
commands.title: Increase Brightness
commands.subtitle: Elgato Key Light
commands.description: Increase brightness of the targeted Key Lights by 5%

commands.name: decreaseBrightness
commands.title: Decrease Brightness
commands.subtitle: Elgato Key Light
commands.description: Decrease brightness of the targeted Key Lights by 5%

commands.name: increaseTemperature
commands.title: Warmer Color Temperature
commands.subtitle: Elgato Key Light
commands.description: Make the targeted lights warmer (lower Kelvin)

commands.name: decreaseTemperature
commands.title: Cooler Color Temperature
commands.subtitle: Elgato Key Light
commands.description: Make the targeted lights cooler (higher Kelvin)

commands.name: apply-preset
commands.title: Apply Preset
commands.subtitle: Elgato Key Light
commands.description: Create, edit, and activate presets for your Key Lights

tools.name: apply-preset
tools.title: Apply Preset
tools.description: Apply a preset to your Elgato Key Lights

tools.name: create-preset
tools.title: Create Preset
tools.description: Create a new preset for your Elgato Key Lights

tools.name: get-presets
tools.title: Get Presets
tools.description: Get all presets for your Elgato Key Lights

tools.name: get-lights
tools.title: Get Lights
tools.description: Get information about your connected Elgato Key Lights

tools.name: turn-on
tools.title: Turn on
tools.description: Turn on your Elgato Key Lights

tools.name: turn-off
tools.title: Turn off
tools.description: Turn off your Elgato Key Lights

tools.name: update-settings
tools.title: Update Settings
tools.description: Update the settings of your Elgato Key Lights

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
